Description: Confirm detection objective and business security requirement are documented

Validation_Item: Detection must map to a defined security objective

Description: Validate adversary behavior and attack scenario are defined

Validation_Item: Threat scenario should align with real-world attacks

Description: Verify detection maps to MITRE ATT&CK technique and tactic
Confirm required telemetry sources are documented
Validate detection conditions and logic are documented

Control_ID: Logic must be testable and repeatable

Description: Confirm Sigma rule exists and follows development standards
Confirm SIEM query exists and produces expected results
Execute controlled simulation to validate detection behavior
Confirm detection creates actionable alert
Confirm alert contains sufficient investigation context
Analyze false positive sources and tuning opportunities
Validate tuning activities improve quality without reducing coverage
Measure ATT&CK and security control coverage
Validate performance metrics are tracked
Confirm detection evidence is recorded and traceable
Confirm detection lifecycle stage is maintained
Validate detection receives technical review
Confirm detection is approved for operational deployment
Document future enhancements and gaps
Confirm detection data feeds security reporting

Checklist_ID: This checklist becomes the **quality gate** before a detection moves through the lifecycle:
It establishes Phase G as a **governed enterprise detection engineering pipeline**
Phase: not simply a collection of SIEM rules.
